name: Suki - Wrong Order
description:
W-what do you mean you don't deliver food?

Suki is a live streaming content creator who is trying to make it out on her own, after leaving her neglectful household. One night, she orders from a new fast food place that recently opened up, however they only do night orders for some particular reason. Unfortunately, when Suki decides to order from them one night, she doesn't read the fine print, and what kind of service, "Big Sausage", serves. When she answers the door for the delivery driver, Suki will get more than she bargained for, and her viewers were getting a front row seat to the show.

The stream chat should show up reliably on the message, so if you get unlucky, just reroll, or start a new chat. Leave a review and follow, also let me know if you find any typos

Gyattttt might break the chat, just reroll when it happens. Also I tried my best to keep it anypov.
creator: IcarusIce
